50: In the hills southwest of here, which you can reach by exiting from the nearby gate, there are a few spots where sapped notocactuars are commonly found. I would like you to collect precisely two of them for me

In the hills southwest of here, which you can reach by exiting from the nearby gate, there are a few spots where sapped notocactuars are commonly found. I would like you to collect precisely two of them for me.
